species: Herein, PepSAVI-MS, a mass spectrometry-based peptidomics pipeline, was implemented for antimicrobial peptide (AMP) discovery in the medicinal plant Amaranthus tricolor.
tissue: The A. tricolor aerial tissue crude extract was subjected to reversed-phase chromatography...
sample_source: A. tricolor seeds purchased from Strictly Medicinal Seeds (Williams, OR) were planted in nutrient rich soil...
age: Plants (~100) were grown to mature rosette stage (~8 weeks) and harvested in November 2018...
cell_line: This investigation revealed a novel 1.7 kDa AMP with strong activity against Escherichia coli ATCC 25922...
strain: This investigation revealed a novel 1.7 kDa AMP with strong activity against Escherichia coli ATCC 25922...
